title: Creeper Recrafted
description: This resource pack makes the creeper look more plant/moss like
body:
This pack reimagines the creepers with a design inspired by a Minecraft movie while trying to stay true to vanilla asthetic. These creepers have a more plant like look to them.
**EMF IS NOT REQUIRED BUT RECOMMENDED for more grassy detail**

Fresh animations version: [Creeper_Refreshed_FA](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/creeper-refreshedfa)

![EMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8f7ecf3c8fafd5ae9df04d0ad5adcf1fd9de833c.png)
